dict.string: SwifterX uses your location to show nearby providers and distance on the map. If you are a service provider on an active job, we share your live location with the customer while you are on the way so they can track your arrival.
SwifterX uses your photo library so you can set a profile photo.
SwifterX uses your camera so you can take a profile photo.
We use analytics to improve the app experience. No data is shared with advertisers.
